88],[466,523,1776531311733],[467,523,1776531311741],[468,523,1776531311783],[468,523,1776531311784],[466,523,1776531311802],[461,524,1776531311814],[453,525,1776531311830],[443,527,1776531311843],[429,530,1776531311855],[414,533,1776531311867],[398,537,1776531311880],[382,542,1776531311891],[367,547,1776531311903],[354,551,1776531311913],[344,555,1776531311929],[337,558,1776531311943],[332,559,1776531311957],[330,560,1776531311975],[329,560,1776531311982],[328,561,1776531311999],[327,561,1776531312019],[327,562,1776531312026],[326,562,1776531312035],[325,562,1776531312041],[325,563,1776531312048],[324,563,1776531312061],[323,563,1776531312072],[322,563,1776531312084],[322,563,1776531312097],[323,563,1776531312108],[323,562,1776531312117],[324,562,1776531312139],[325,561,1776531312182],[326,560,1776531312219],[327,560,1776531312257]],"mm-mp":18.5249500998004,"md":[[321,562,1776531312087]],"md-mp":4210.75,"mu":[[321,562,1776531312279]],"mu-mp":4242.0},"v":1,"tc":{}}
